owned_files.notes: All 118 periodic table elements present (H through Og). Complete schema: atomic_number, symbol, name, category, atomic_mass, density, melting/boiling points, thermal/electrical conductivity, specific heat, electronegativity, ionization energy, crustal abundance, state_at_stp, radioactive/flammable/toxic flags, description.

summary: Periodic table fully populated with all known elements. No new elements expected; passive until discovery occurs.
